mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals resilient household demand and stabilizing revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment above its recent trend signals weakening income growth and rising recession probability, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 12-month moving average by more than 0.2 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time or if triggered returns are not below unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid federal funds rate decline during stress is interpreted as a central-bank reaction to deteriorating financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by more than 75 basis points over 3 months
regime_hint: emergency monetary easing during credit stress
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day SPX returns after rapid FEDFUNDS declines are positive in more than 60% of triggered cases or exceed unconditional 5-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Falling policy rates combined with rising consumer prices signals an inflation-constrained easing cycle, limiting valuation support and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls over 3 months while CPIAUCSL rises over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-down and CPIAUCSL-up state has nonnegative average 60-day excess SPX returns or no incremental effect versus either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts signals weaker construction activity, tighter household balance sheets, and bank-credit losses, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 20% year over year
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST year-over-year declines greater than 20% are followed by 60-day SPX returns above the sample median in more than half of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production indicates falling real activity and operating leverage pressure on earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls for two consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if two-month INDPRO declines are not associated with below-baseline 20-day SPX returns or if the sign of the coefficient is positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll contraction paired with rising unemployment confirms broad labor-income weakness rather than survey noise, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls over 1 month and UNRATE rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-down and UNRATE-up trigger does not lower mean 60-day SPX returns versus PAYEMS-only and UNRATE-only signals.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP deceleration across consecutive quarters signals falling aggregate demand and earnings risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth falls for two consecutive reported quarters
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive GDPC1 growth decelerations are followed by 60-day SPX returns above unconditional returns, or if the signal loses significance after vintage-data testing.
